name: SkillBar
description: Build, run, troubleshoot, and extend the local SkillBar macOS menu-bar manager for codex-goated skills, packs, installs, updates, and catalog integrity checks.
short_description: Build and refine the goated skills and pack menu bar manager.
default_prompt: Use $skillbar to work on SkillBar, the macOS menu bar manager for codex-goated-skills, including the catalog UI, preset bundles, repo pack browsing, metadata parsing, install or update flows, and repo catalog or integrity checks.
audience: Maintainers of the codex-goated skill catalog
Local-first Codex users installing skill packs
Mac utility builders validating menu-bar install flows
detail_lines: Keeps the real app surface in apps/skillbar aligned with the repo-driven catalog, installed-state model, pack browser, and bin/codex-goated install/update paths.
Provides a compact validation workflow for doctor, inspect, catalog-check, audit, typecheck, smoke-install, smoke-update, and test.
Stays local-first by reading checkout metadata and installed skill folders without adding remote marketplace sync or unrelated secrets.
